description: Cross-vertical coverage: the same extraction and red-flag code must work on auto repair, where the benchmark is a flat $450 with no bedroom scaling. Four itemized charges including a diagnostic fee.

job_fields.symptom: grinding from the front when braking

simulated_conversation.message: Calling about a 2015 Honda Civic — grinding from the front when braking. Customer wants a quote for front brakes.
Precision Auto, this is Mike. Front pads and rotors on a Civic — parts are two eighty, labor's two hours at one ten, so two twenty.
Five hundred for parts and labor. Is there a diagnostic fee on top?
Hundred and twenty to put it on the lift, but we waive it if you do the work with us. There's also a fifteen dollar shop supplies charge.
So five fifteen if the diagnostic is waived. Is that firm?
Firm unless we find a seized caliper once it's up. Then we'd call you first.

tool_calls.params_as_json: {"outcome": "quote_given", "company_name": "Precision Auto Works", "base_price": 500, "line_items": [{"label": "Front pads and rotors (parts)", "amount": 280, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Labor (2 hrs @ $110)", "amount": 220, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}, {"label": "Diagnostic fee (waived with repair)", "amount": 120, "is_optional_or_conditional": true}, {"label": "Shop supplies", "amount": 15, "is_optional_or_conditional": false}], "total_price": 515, "binding": true}
